Home
Guides

Adaptive Planning
Contract Management
HiredScore
Peakon
Developers
Community
Let's find what you're looking for
Your one-stop shop for Workday Documentation
Latest News
New! Announcements history now available!
You can now view historic
Announcements
about Workday documentation from the last 12 months by selecting the
Previous Posts
link for each announcement type. As a result, we'll retire the original Community location,
Information Experience Enhancements
, on June 12, 2026.
New Video Content
We’ve published new videos in the Administrator Guide, showing how to create questionnaires in Workday using three different examples, and we'd love your feedback! See this
Content Crew post
for more information and to fill out a short survey.
New Workday AI Guide
Fresh off the press! Have a look at the new Workday AI guide for Workday Agents, Sana for Workday, and the Platform Consumption Console. You'll find setup, security, and conceptual information to help you adopt this new functionality.
Workday Content Crew
Collaborate with other customers and attend live sessions about Workday documentation by joining our user group. Check it out!
Quick Links

How to Use Workday Documentation
Guides
Release Center
Glossary

Legal Notice
Login Help
Workday Success Plans
How-to Videos

analysis.name: Workday
analysis.value_proposition: A unified enterprise AI platform that manages HR, Finance, and IT operations in a single system, now augmented by AI agents and an autonomous intelligence layer called Sana.
analysis.ideal_customer: Large enterprises and public-sector organizations needing a single integrated system for global HR, finance, payroll, and planning across complex org structures.

features.name: human capital management
features.description: Core HCM system covering the full employee lifecycle from hire to retire.

features.name: human resource management
features.description: Core HR data management including org structure, positions, and worker records.

features.name: talent management
features.description: Recruiting, performance management, learning, and career development tools.

features.name: workforce management
features.description: Time tracking, scheduling, absence management, and labor optimization.

features.name: employee experience
features.description: Personalized employee portal and digital experience layer for self-service.

features.name: hr service delivery
features.description: HR case management, knowledge base, and ticketing for employee inquiries.

features.name: employee voice
features.description: Continuous employee listening and engagement surveys (powered by Workday Peakon).

features.name: workforce planning
features.description: Headcount planning, scenario modeling, and strategic workforce analytics.

features.name: hr analytics & reporting
features.description: Pre-built and custom workforce dashboards, people analytics, and reporting.

features.name: vendor management system
features.description: Management of contingent workers, staffing agencies, and external workforce.

features.name: local & global payroll
features.description: Native payroll processing with support for local and international payroll compliance.

features.name: financial management
features.description: General ledger, accounts payable/receivable, fixed assets, and core accounting.

features.name: spend management
features.description: Procurement, supplier management, expenses, and sourcing in a unified spend platform.

features.name: financial planning
features.description: Integrated FP&A, budgeting, and forecasting (Workday Adaptive Planning).

features.name: finance analytics & reporting
features.description: Financial dashboards, management reporting, and analytics across finance data.

features.name: close & consolidation
features.description: Financial close management, intercompany eliminations, and consolidation reporting.

features.name: operational planning
features.description: Business-unit-level operational plans that connect to financial and workforce plans.

features.name: contract intelligence
features.description: AI-powered contract data extraction, search, and insights (Evisort/Workday).

features.name: contract lifecycle management
features.description: End-to-end contract authoring, negotiation, approval, and renewal management.

features.name: frontline workforce solutions
features.description: Tools designed for deskless, shift-based, and hourly frontline workers.

features.name: professional services automation
features.description: Project management, resource planning, project billing, and costing for services firms.

features.name: supply chain management for healthcare
features.description: Healthcare-specific supply chain and inventory management module.

features.name: student management
features.description: Higher education student records, enrollment, and academic management system.

features.name: workday extend
features.description: Low-code platform for building custom apps and extensions on top of Workday.

features.name: orchestrate & integrations
features.description: Workflow orchestration, iPaaS-style integration, and API connectivity to external systems.

features.name: data cloud
features.description: Unified data layer aggregating Workday and external data for analytics and AI.

features.name: workday erp
features.description: Full enterprise resource planning suite spanning HR, Finance, and Planning.

features.name: workday marketplace
features.description: App marketplace with pre-built partner integrations, agents, and extensions.
features.evidence_quote: Discover, learn, and evaluate ready-made solutions from Workday and trusted partners.

features.name: sana from workday
features.description: AI superintelligence layer that automates work across HR, Finance, IT via conversational AI.
features.evidence_quote: Sana from Workday is the superintelligence that automates work across HR, Finance, IT, and beyond.

features.name: agent system of record
features.description: Platform to deploy, manage, govern, and audit AI agents across the enterprise.

features.name: ai agents
features.description: Autonomous AI agents that execute multi-step tasks across HR, Finance, and IT workflows.

features.name: responsible ai framework
features.description: Governance, bias detection, and ethical guardrails baked into Workday's AI products.

features.name: hiredscore
features.description: AI orchestration for recruiting and internal mobility, acquired by Workday.
features.evidence_quote: Achieve iconic value in hiring speed, quality, and workforce agility with AI orchestration for recruiting.

features.name: adaptive planning
features.description: Standalone and integrated planning platform connecting to any ERP/GL or data source.
features.evidence_quote: The planning system that integrates with any ERP/GL or data source.

features.name: peakon employee surveys
features.description: Continuous employee engagement listening and predictive analytics (Workday Peakon).

features.name: workday paradox
features.description: Conversational AI for recruiting, candidate engagement, and HR interactions.

features.name: midsize business solutions
features.description: Pre-configured Workday deployment tailored for mid-market organizations.

features.name: self-service agent
features.description: AI agent that gives employees instant answers and completes tasks on their behalf.
features.evidence_quote: Empower your workforce with instant answers and effortless task completion.

features.name: 360 feedback
features.description: Multi-rater feedback collection for leaders, teams, and performance reviews.
features.evidence_quote: 360 Feedback in Workday: Gain full-perspective insights to grow leaders, teams, and performance.

features.name: employee recognition
features.description: Peer-to-peer recognition with gift card rewards built into the Workday platform.
features.evidence_quote: Give feedback to your coworkers and even reward them with gift cards for their hard work.

features.name: employee document management
features.description: Digital HR document storage and management within Workday, reducing manual effort.
features.evidence_quote: Reduce HR document management effort by up to 70%

features.name: employee relations management
features.description: Case management for global employee relations, grievances, and ER processes.
features.evidence_quote: Manage your global Employee Relations, including grievances processes, entirely in Workday.

features.name: incentive compensation management
features.description: Plan design, data collection, and payout calculation for bonus and commission programs.
features.evidence_quote: Manage incentive compensation, from plan design and data collection to target and actual payout calculations.

features.name: invoice ai / ap automation
features.description: AI-driven accounts payable invoice processing and automation.
features.evidence_quote: Eliminate manual invoice processing with AI-driven efficiency and seamless Workday integration.

features.name: ap inbox helpdesk
features.description: AI that handles AP email inbox queries, improving finance team operational efficiency.
features.evidence_quote: Streamlines turnaround of AP inbox emails for improved operational efficiency in the finance office.

features.name: financial close companion
features.description: AI-assisted month-end close process with streamlined reconciliation workflows.
features.evidence_quote: Transform Your Month-End Close: Streamline, Simplify, and Succeed with Financial Close Agent!

features.name: advanced reconciliation
features.description: Automated financial reconciliation and close management integrated with Workday Financials.
features.evidence_quote: Trintech Advanced Reconciliation and Close for Workday Financials

features.name: pay when paid
features.description: Automatically links supplier invoices to customer invoices for properly timed vendor payments.
features.evidence_quote: Automatically link supplier invoices to customer invoices, ensuring properly timed vendor payments.

features.name: customer portal payments
features.description: Customer payment collection integrated and tracked within Workday.
features.evidence_quote: Customer payments simplified, secured, and fully tracked in Workday

features.name: job profile manager
features.description: AI-assisted job architecture and profile management integrated with Workday HCM.
features.evidence_quote: Korn Ferry and Workday – Better together, for better results.

features.name: compensation benchmarking
features.description: AI-powered compensation partner intelligence for market data and comp decisions.
features.evidence_quote: AI that thinks like your best comp partner.

features.name: leadership coaching
features.description: AI-powered manager performance and leadership coaching tools.

features.name: workday ai guide
features.description: Documentation and setup guidance for Workday Agents, Sana, and the Platform Consumption Console.
features.evidence_quote: New Workday AI guide for Workday Agents, Sana for Workday, and the Platform Consumption Console.

features.name: platform consumption console
features.description: Dashboard for monitoring and managing AI platform usage and consumption.
features.evidence_quote: Workday Agents, Sana for Workday, and the Platform Consumption Console.

features.name: workday build / devcon
features.description: Developer platform and community event (DevCon) for building on top of Workday.
features.evidence_quote: Workday DevCon hits Vegas June 1–4. Hundreds of developers. Four days of nonstop build inspiration.

features.name: credit card request orchestration
features.description: Automated corporate credit card request workflow via Workday Orchestrations.
features.evidence_quote: Create a Credit Card request using Orchestrations.

features.name: multi-language / localization
features.description: Platform available in 20+ languages across global regions.
features.evidence_quote: Asia-Pacific & Japan... Europe, Middle East & Africa... North America

differentiators: Single unified platform spanning HR, Finance, and IT — no bolt-on integrations between pillars
Sana: proprietary AI superintelligence layer described as automating work 'across HR, Finance, IT, and beyond'
Agent System of Record — a dedicated system to manage, govern, and audit all AI agents
Responsible AI framework built into the platform and surfaced as a marketplace badge
Workday Extend low-code platform for enterprise-grade custom app development on Workday infrastructure
Planning platform (Adaptive Planning) that integrates with any ERP/GL, not just Workday
Purpose-built industry verticals: Healthcare supply chain, Higher Ed student management, Public Sector
Native global payroll across local and international payrolls in a single system
Marketplace ecosystem of partner agents, apps, and integrations purpose-built for Workday

praised: No G2 data returned; source was blocked
Hacker News results were about 'workday' as a general concept, not the Workday product — no usable sentiment
complaints: No G2 data returned; source was blocked
No relevant HN discussion of Workday the product found in provided sources

pricing.notes: Workday does not publish pricing publicly. All deployments are enterprise contracts sold through a sales team. Workday Adaptive Planning is separately licensed. Midsize Business Solutions exists as a distinct offering for mid-market, also contact-sales. No trial or self-serve tier is available.
